query:
-- Insert 5 real sample registered users
INSERT INTO users (name, email, passwordHash, role, createdAt) VALUES
('Sarah Chen', 'sarah.chen@example.com', 'hash1', 'user', NOW()),
('Marcus Johnson', 'marcus.j@example.com', 'hash2', 'user', NOW()),
('Priya Patel', 'priya.patel@example.com', 'hash3', 'user', NOW()),
('David Kim', 'david.kim@example.com', 'hash4', 'user', NOW()),
('Emma Rodriguez', 'emma.r@example.com', 'hash5', 'user', NOW());

-- Get the IDs of newly created users
SELECT id, name FROM users WHERE name IN ('Sarah Chen', 'Marcus Johnson', 'Priya Patel', 'David Kim', 'Emma Rodriguez') ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 5;
